attacking_style: Rarely attacks for personal gain; when he does, uses long-range solo efforts (13.6km) tactically to disrupt rival sprint trains rather than target stage wins.
team_tactics: Pure domestique role: paces breakaways for extended periods, takes front after crashes to limit team losses, sacrifices individual result for team tactics. No leadout train usage for himself.
terrain_preference: Time trials are his natural domain, maintaining top-level TT performances even with race fatigue. Flat stages used for team pacing duties; struggles to hold wheels in high-speed finishes.
vulnerability: Crash-prone on technical hazards (road furniture, speed bumps) that eliminate him from key stages. Fades in final 5km of time trials under pressure. Unable to match climbing engines in second half of TTs.
key_patterns: Crashes on mid-stage technical obstacles (road furniture, speed bumps) eliminating team's tactical options (2 instances)
Fades in final 5km of time trials, losing 12+ seconds when under pressure (2 instances)
Elite organizational instinct: immediately assumes front after crashes to limit team losses (2+ instances)
Used tactically for long solo efforts to disrupt rival sprint trains, not personal results (2 instances)
Declining from prime TT form across 2017-2019: beaten by climbing engines, losing time in closings (3+ instances)
form_trajectory: negative: 2021 crash-out follows pattern of declining TT performance and technical vulnerability evident since 2017. No recent competitive results shown.
